text:
Configuration Reference
dynamic-rate-limiting-ingress:
# Timing
tick_interval_ms: 1000
server_status_timeout_ms: 400
forecast_interval_ms: 5000
# Behavior
dry_run: false
active_signals: All
signals_history_capacity: 10
min_fcv: 8.2
# Thresholds
overload_thresholds:
cpu_pressure_percent: 80
status_cmd_latency_millis: 500
hold_duration_secs: 0
read_dwell_time:
per_ticket_micros: 20000
rate: 300
write_dwell_time:
per_ticket_micros: 20000
rate: 300
# Memory thresholds
available_memory_mb: 1024
oom_score: 1200
page_faults_per_sec: 50000
some_memory_pressure_per_mill: 50
# Algorithm (choose one)
rate_limiter:
type: PController
config:
init_rate_per_sec: 10000
burst_capacity_secs: 1.5
target_dwell_time_micros: 5000
gain: 100
# Exemptions (apps that bypass limiting)
rate_limiter_exemptions:
- OplogFetcher
- MongoDB Internal Client
- NetworkInterfaceTL-Repl
- MongoDB Automation Agent
- mongotune
- mongot
- ReplCoordExtern
# Poll/tune cycle (100-600, 000)
# Max wait for serverStatus (100-10,000)
# Memory trend window
# true = log only, don't modify params
# All | Cpu | Memory
# Samples before declaring overload
# Minimum MongoDB version
# Keep limiting after overload clears
# or: Aimd, Fixed
